# Security Test Report

##  Test Result: SKIP

**Test:** CSRF: requests without token are rejected
**Timestamp:** 2026-05-15T03:09:37.067Z
**OWASP Category:** N/A

## Description

Test skipped: CSRF missing-token probe could not run because login failed or no bearer token was obtained.

## Why this result

Skipped because CSRF missing-token probe could not run because login failed or no bearer token was obtained.
